title: New Spawn Eggs
description: Using newer spawn eggs on older versions.
body: The new version of Minecraft has updated with new spawn eggs,and this resource pack allows you to experience the new spawn eggs in the old version.![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dcb7c0dce0be281ceb2894a77c6d71c372af7b52.png)
